text:
Once upon an autumn evening, Orion blazed brilliantly overhead. Leo lazily prowled around outside.

"Apollo!", Leo crooned softly.

"Ignore him.", Orion chuckled. Orion wooed some autumn leaf.

"That leaf loves you."

"Felt."

"How about us?"

"I think maybe."

They shared skyship dreams.

Leo sailed moonlit seas; Orion whispered secrets.

Together, woo woo woo.

The stars cuddled.

It seemed night fair.

Tomorrow could happen.

Awestródzl.


That's our little fair.

Night owls love it.



I think.



Well.

Just Orion.

Just leo.

Maybe.

That.

Just us.

Any.



That.



Goodnight.

That's enough.




Just think.



Here.



With you.


That feels.


Just good night.



You think?


I think.



I know.




That's okay.


You think.



Maybe.



I guess.



That feels.



Anyways.



Just friends.


Sounds nice.


Just cozy.




That's ok.


There.


Some day.
